project_type: pnpm monorepo (Turborepo) with TypeScript packages and apps
build_system: pnpm 10.28 + Turborepo. Each package has 'typecheck' script (tsc --noEmit). Root scripts: lint, typecheck, test, build, format.
test_framework: Vitest 2 with globals:true. Test files in src/__tests__/*.test.ts pattern. Uses describe/it/expect from vitest.
build_command: unset NODE_OPTIONS && npx tsc --noEmit -p packages/ai/tsconfig.json && npx tsc --noEmit -p packages/realtime/tsconfig.json
verification_instructions: 1. Run typecheck for ai and realtime packages. 2. Run vitest run to confirm all tests pass (including new ones). 3. Verify no lint errors.
setup_instructions: pnpm install (already done). Create new branch from feat/production-ready-phase2-phase3.
environment_constraints: COMMON_DEPENDENCIES network - can install from npm. Node 22. NODE_OPTIONS has a preload that breaks turbo - must use 'unset NODE_OPTIONS &&' prefix or call npx vitest/tsc directly. No database (Prisma schema exists but no actual DB). No Redis available for live tests (must mock).
contribution_requirements: TypeScript strict mode. ESM modules. Package references via workspace:*. Tests use vitest with globals.
key_patterns: Packages export from src/index.ts. Types in src/types.ts. Core logic in src/core/. Services in src/services/. Tests in src/__tests__/. Existing AI engine uses simulateResponse() - needs full replacement with real SDK calls. Realtime has no-op sendToClient() - needs real ws implementation. tsconfig extends root tsconfig.json. Each package has its own tsconfig with composite:true.
directory_structure: Root: apps/ (9 apps), packages/ (27 packages). Key packages: ai (AI engine), realtime (WebSocket), auth (JWT/password), server-core (Fastify), common (shared types), database (Prisma). Each package has src/ with index.ts entry point.
